title: cynoglossum officinale var. montanum
intro: Cynoglossum officinale var. montanum, also known as mountain hound's tongue, is a plant species within the borage family (Boraginaceae) that is native to mountainous regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cynoglossum officinale var. montanum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
